examples: If a mixed traffic system way was in place, automated driving could begin whenever the driver was on suitably equipped roads.
He felt suitably chastened and apologized.
I am not really suitably dressed for a party.
England paceman Kirtley, who was sitting out of the game with shin splints, was suitably jubilant.
Once the result is suitably purified, however, it can be pressed into the desired material.
